case_title: AMERICA CALIFORNIA BANK VS OLYMPIC LAUNDRY

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT OLYMPIC LAUNDRY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY AMERICA CALIFORNIA BANK AS TO DEFENDANT OLYMPIC LAUNDRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-20-1996 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICA CALIFORNIA BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OLYMPIC LAUNDRY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,000.00, PLFT WAIVES COSTS OF SUIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
